title: linum muelleri
intro: Linum muelleri, also known as Maire's flax, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Linaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Linum muelleri include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Linum muelleri can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, allowing for different uses and applications.
